description: Design a sun-synchronous repeat ground track orbit (16-day / 233-revolution repeat cycle) for the EarthMapper-3 mission using the requirements in ~/Desktop/earthmapper3_orbit_requirements.txt. Create a GMAT script at ~/GMAT_output/earthmapper3_orbit.script that propagates the satellite for one full repeat cycle (16 days). Record the computed orbit parameters and verification results to ~/GMAT_output/groundtrack_design_results.txt including the following fields: SMA_km, INC_deg, ECC, altitude_km, longitude_drift_deg, repeat_cycle_revolutions, and sun_sync_RAAN_rate_degperday.
